notes: Read-only diagnostic release: adds /api/zonestate returning the raw ZoneGroupTopology::GetZoneGroupState XML verbatim from the paired speaker. Zero behavior change — Play/Pause/Next/Prev/rotation still route directly to the selected speaker's IP as in v1.0.35. This exists so the group-coordinator parser can be designed against real household XML instead of the memory-derived schema that broke v1.0.34.
